'''Rory''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member who served the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was one of the survivors of the attack on the transport [[Bright Hope/Legends|''Bright Hope'']] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] and assisted [[Toryn Farr/Legends|Toryn Farr]] when she took command of the surviving passengers. He was the first to sight the approaching ship [[Mist Hunter/Legends|''Mist Hunter'']], and was rescued with the other survivors by [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] and [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]].

==Appearances==
